gongbans.name: ZigBee Gateway
gongbans.application: Central hub for ZigBee mesh networks. Coordinates devices, bridges to Wi-Fi/Ethernet upstream.
gongbans.hans_notes: Hans note pending — what to look for when sourcing JN5169-based gateways from a Shenzhen ODM.

gongbans.name: ZigBee PIR Motion Sensor
gongbans.application: Battery-powered occupancy / motion detection node. Pairs with ZigBee gateway. Common in smart lighting and security applications.
gongbans.hans_notes: Hans note pending — battery life claims, PIR lens supplier games, EMC weak spots.

gongbans.name: ZigBee Door / Magnetic Sensor
gongbans.application: Reed-switch + magnet pair for door / window open-close detection. Battery-powered, ZigBee mesh node.
gongbans.hans_notes: Hans note pending — reed switch sourcing, magnet specs, false trigger gotchas.

gongbans.name: ZigBee Smart Light
gongbans.application: ZigBee-controlled LED bulb / strip. Dimming, color temperature or RGB depending on driver.
gongbans.hans_notes: Hans note pending — driver IC pairings, AC-DC stage shortcuts factories take, certification reality.

gongbans.name: ZigBee Smart Socket / Plug
gongbans.application: Mains-powered relay outlet with ZigBee control. Often paired with energy metering IC for power monitoring.
gongbans.hans_notes: Hans note pending — relay sourcing (Omron clones vs real), creepage / clearance reality on cheap boards.

gongbans.name: BLE Module (QN9022)
gongbans.application: Generic BLE peripheral / central module. Drop-in for sensor beacons, fitness trackers, BLE-controlled gadgets.
gongbans.hans_notes: Hans note pending — see also P15-090 BLE reference design (full hardware pack available).

gongbans.name: Speech Recognition Module
gongbans.application: Offline keyword-spotting / limited command set voice control. Common in low-cost voice toys and appliances pre-Alexa-era.
gongbans.hans_notes: Hans note pending — Nuvoton tooling reality, mic sourcing, vocabulary training process.

gongbans.name: Smart Home Hub (Quark D2000)
gongbans.application: Smart-home control hub. Intel's failed embedded play — interesting historically; real production uses moved to ARM.
gongbans.hans_notes: Hans note pending — Intel killed Quark in 2019. Sourcing today: NRND. Listed for archaeological completeness.

gongbans.name: BLE Electronic Lock
gongbans.application: Bluetooth-controlled door lock. Phone-as-key model. Variants for residential, hotel, locker applications.
gongbans.hans_notes: Hans note pending — security audit reality (most cheap BLE locks are pwned), motor / solenoid driver, low-battery handling.

gongbans.name: Sports Bracelet / Fitness Tracker
gongbans.application: Wrist-worn activity tracker. Heart rate / step count / sleep. Companion app over BLE (typically separate radio).
gongbans.hans_notes: Hans note pending — sensor fusion shortcuts factories take, battery life claims vs reality, strap material sourcing.

gongbans.name: Bluetooth Smart Running Shoes
gongbans.application: BLE-instrumented footwear. Pace, cadence, foot-strike analysis. Mostly novelty / fitness niche.
gongbans.hans_notes: Hans note pending — encapsulation for sweat, insole flex life, charging interface options.

gongbans.name: UV Sensor Demo (VEML6075 + LPC824)
gongbans.application: Reference design for UV index measurement. Useful for wearables (sunburn warning), outdoor environmental monitoring, smart hat / umbrella products.
gongbans.hans_notes: Hans note pending — VEML6075 stock status (Vishay deprecated → check VEML6030 family), UV calibration drift, optical window choice (most factories skip the right glass).

gongbans.name: Gesture Recognition (VCNL4020 + LPC824)
gongbans.application: Touchless gesture detection. Reference example: a hand-cream dispenser (the original 'Oscar-Hand Cream' project — wave hand under sensor). Also used in soap dispensers, faucets, novelty UI.
gongbans.hans_notes: Hans note pending — IR window material choice (factories use whatever's cheap, kills SNR), enclosure depth tolerance, ambient light rejection tuning.

gongbans.name: RGB Color Sensor
gongbans.application: Color measurement. Common in white balance for cameras, color matching tools, smart lighting feedback loops.
gongbans.hans_notes: Hans note pending — calibration vs reference standard, optical glass choice, why factories skip the calibration step.

gongbans.name: Proximity Sensor
gongbans.application: Distance sensing 1–200mm. Phone earpiece (turn-off-screen-when-near-ear), automatic faucets, parking sensors variants.
gongbans.hans_notes: Hans note pending — variant of P15-097 Gesture board with simpler firmware. Same hardware lessons apply.

gongbans.name: BLE Reference Design (QN9022)
gongbans.application: Full BLE reference design with WeChat (微信) hardware integration example. Shows AirSync protocol implementation — the path to 'works with WeChat' certification used by countless China-market BLE products.
gongbans.hans_notes: Hans note pending — QN9022 has been EOL'd by NXP. Mainland clones (QN9020 family) still available via HQEW. WeChat AirSync is the most underdocumented feature in Western teardowns.
